# collider

path `collider` · uuid `35baa33a-2646-880f-a884-4a24ff0ba834` · diamond `290ae99f-7abc-8b7b-85e9-f5e73ce430fc`

analysis —
law the collider has no default — it computes the corpus's tamper-cost purely from the convention-checks' coverages. Joint coverage is the product (every convention holds at once); tamper-cost is coverageCostLog2(joint, n). Zero entropy — every check computed clean — is ∞ by the math, not by assumption. No default-pass, no default-fail, no clamp, no fallback: only math.
